subcodes.first_line: O friends! In these days events have come to pass within this prison, and all are from the hidden decrees of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان در این ایام وقوعاتی در این زندان واقع گشته و جمیع از مقدرات غیبیه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @obedience to and respect for government authority
